column1: # schema: 15
# MacStudio LLM — model catalog (seed)
# Pipe-delimited, shell-readable, TUI-editable (see `llm-models`). This file is a
# SEED: on `setup.sh --apply` it is copied to /usr/local/etc/macstudio-models/catalog.tsv
# only if that file is absent or has an older "# schema:" line (old one is backed up
# first). After that the live copy is TUI-owned — add models via `llm-models`.
# Only READY, pre-converted MLX repos belong here (NO local conversion). Source =
# HuggingFace, repo-ids are `org/name` (not URLs). Gated repos (gated=yes) need an HF
# token (`llm-models` -> t) + accepting the licence on the model page.
# Roles (the backend is fixed per role — ALL THREE now served by the SAME resident
# oMLX process, see CLAUDE.md):
#   role=text   -> alias 'main' (oMLX — UNIFIED text+images+embed+rerank in one process,
#                  SSD paged-prefix-cache, continuous batching; needs a VLM arch like
#                  gemma-4). oMLX is the only text engine.
#   role=embed  -> alias 'embed' (BGE DENSE embeddings for RAG, served by the SAME oMLX
#                  process as main — no separate backend/venv).
#   role=rerank -> alias 'rerank' (BGE cross-encoder reranker, same oMLX process).
# A note containing BROKEN (or BROKEN[<engine>]) makes a model non-selectable for that
# engine (every slot now checks BROKEN[omlx] — main/embed/rerank share one engine).
# Sampling cols 14-17 (temperature/top_p/frequency_penalty/presence_penalty) = per-model
# defaults injected into the LiteLLM 'main' alias (clients can override). Empty for
# embed/rerank.
# This seed is intentionally LEAN: gemma-4 QAT mains (text+image+tools) + a BGE
# embed/rerank pair. gemma4-26b-qat is the default main. (The main does images itself, so
# there is no separate OCR alias; document OCR uses paperless-ocr's Apple Vision path.)
# columns:
# id|hf_repo|role|engine|quant|gb|gated|reasoning_parser|tool_parser|max_kv_size|max_num_seqs|rating|notes|temperature|top_p|frequency_penalty|presence_penalty
# ── Gemma-4 QAT mains (oMLX) — unified text+image+tools, same process also serves embed/rerank ──
# Google QAT 4-bit builds (gemma4_unified, image-text-to-text). QAT beats naive PTQ 4-bit
# (the plain -4bit mlx builds have a PLE-quant garbage-output bug). Correctness (vision 4/4,
# tool calling, thinking toggle) verified against oMLX in a sandboxed eval 2026-07-13; the
# tok/s figures below are the prior mlx-vlm 0.6.3 baseline (2026-07-04) carried over from
# before the cutover — re-verify on oMLX in production and refresh these notes once measured.

gemma4-12b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-12B-it-qat-4bit|text|omlx|4bit|11|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|4|QAT 12B dense unified, multimodal text+image+tools. Prior mlx-vlm 0.6.3 baseline: text 19 tok/s, tools OK, vision 4/4 — re-verify on oMLX. gated; native max 262144|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

gemma4-26b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-qat-4bit|text|omlx|4bit|16|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|5|DEFAULT main. QAT 26B-A4B MoE (~4B active), multimodal text+image+tools. Prior mlx-vlm 0.6.3 baseline: text 32 tok/s, tools OK, vision 4/4; sandboxed oMLX eval measured ~48 tok/s fixed-length decode (no regression) plus a real ~15x TTFT win on repeated long prompts via the SSD paged-prefix-cache — re-verify in production. gated; native max 262144|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

gemma4-e4b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-4bit|text|omlx|4bit|8|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|3|QAT E4B edge main, multimodal text+image+tools. Prior mlx-vlm 0.6.3 baseline: text 34 tok/s, tools OK, vision 4/4 — re-verify on oMLX. fast/light ~7.5 GB. gated|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

gemma4-e2b-qat|mlx-community/gemma-4-E2B-it-qat-4bit|text|omlx|4bit|6|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|1|3|QAT E2B smallest multimodal, text+image+tools. Prior mlx-vlm 0.6.3 baseline: text 53 tok/s (fastest), tools OK, vision 4/4 — re-verify on oMLX. ~5.2 GB. gated|1.0|0.95|0.3|0.3

bge-m3|BAAI/bge-m3|embed|omlx|fp16|2|no|||||5|Multilingual DENSE embedder (BGE-M3, 1024-dim, 8192 ctx) for RAG. Served by the SAME resident oMLX process as main (no separate backend/venv) via --model-dir. LiteLLM alias 'embed' (/v1/embeddings). Cross-lingual correctness verified in a sandboxed eval 2026-07-13 (cosine ~0.97 for a translation pair vs ~0.62 unrelated). Needed a --model-dir symlink under a mlx-tagged name — oMLX's HF-cache auto-discovery only trusts mlx-community/*-style repos. Not gated.||||

bge-reranker-v2-m3|BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3|rerank|omlx|fp16|2|no|||||5|Multilingual cross-encoder RERANKER (bge-reranker-v2-m3) matching bge-m3. Served by the SAME resident oMLX process as main via --model-dir. LiteLLM alias 'rerank' — well-calibrated ordering verified in the sandboxed eval, but only at the raw-oMLX level; rerank via LiteLLM's bare 'openai/' provider is NOT a standardized OpenAI endpoint and needs re-verification through the gateway in production. Not gated.||||
